findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "devexpress_docs_get_content" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Get full document content by URL from DevExpress documentation. Use this tool to retrieve the complete markdown content of a specific documentation page. PREREQ…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
